Name: Meadow Integration
Tagline: Data integration tools for CSV import, schema mapping, and centralized format transformations

		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24

		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24

					<path d="M 24 80 L 48 52 L 72 80 Z" fill="#49b2c1" opacity="0.9"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"

			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">MI</text>
	</svg>
